features: 【Elegant Bow Decoration】The ribbon and gift bag are separated, you can decorate the bow according to your needs, the silver bow is classic and fashionable, which can make your gift bags with handles more exquisite and high-end
【Excellent Material】Paper gift bags with silver bow ribbon is made of paper material. Durable, thick and not easy to break, durable support, can be used for a long time, Chirstmas Gift Bags

【Size Details】The single size of the white gift bags is 12.5x10x4.3inch/32x25x11cm, the size is big enough to hold many small gifts, the set includes 10 gift bags, the quantity is enough to meet your daily needs

【DIY Use】The pure white background party favor bag with elegant bow ribbon allows you to use your imagination, you can decorate the gift bag by writing, graffiti, sticker printing, etc. To make your party more unique and impressive

【Application】White paper bags are suitable for many occasions, such as weddings, birthday parties, valentine's day gifts, Christmas gift happy new year gift baby showers, graduation parties, can be used for party gift bags, shopping bags, retail bags, merchandise bags, many uses to meet different needs
